name: @tryinget/pi-trigger-adapter
description: Trigger broker and picker registration adapter for pi-interaction runtime
readme:
# @tryinget/pi-trigger-adapter

Trigger broker + picker registration adapter for the `pi-interaction` runtime family.

## Exports

- `TriggerBroker`, `getBroker`, `resetBroker`
- `registerPickerInteraction`
- `splitQueryAndContext` (re-export)
